message:
feat(wasm): add font-size-aware text metrics to WebCanvas2dContext and extract canvas_font_size_px helper

WebCanvas2dContext now tracks the current font string and uses it to derive
accurate text height from measure_text instead of returning a hardcoded 14px.
The fallback path (when browser measure_text fails) also uses proportional
width estimation (font_size * 0.57 per char) instead of fixed 8px.

Extracts canvas_font_size_px() helper that parses "Npx family" CSS font
strings, validated by a new test. Also makes the helper available under
cfg(test) for mock context usage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
